executives.name: Craig Arnold
executives.background: Craig Arnold is Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of Eaton. He was appointed Chairman and CEO on June 1, 2016. Previously, he served as President and Chief Operating Officer of Eaton and as Vice Chairman and Chief Operating Officer of the Industrial Sector. He joined Eaton in 2000 as Senior Vice President and Group Executive of the Fluid Power Group. Prior to Eaton, he held various leadership positions at General Electric.

executives.name: Olivier Leonetti
executives.background: Olivier Leonetti is Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Eaton. He joined Eaton in 2024. Prior to joining Eaton, he served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Johnson Controls International plc from 2020 to 2024. He also served as CFO of Zebra Technologies and Western Digital.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Heath Monesmith
executives.background: Heath Monesmith is President and Chief Operating Officer, Electrical Sector. He was appointed to this role in 2022. Previously, he served as President and Chief Operating Officer, Industrial Sector, and as Executive Vice President and General Counsel.

tenure_dates.title: President and Chief Operating Officer, Electrical Sector

executives.name: Paulo Ruiz
executives.background: Paulo Ruiz is President and Chief Operating Officer, Industrial Sector. He was appointed to this role in 2022. He joined Eaton in 2019 as President of the Hydraulics Group. Prior to Eaton, he spent more than 18 years with Siemens.

tenure_dates.title: President and Chief Operating Officer, Industrial Sector

executives.name: Ernest Marshall, Jr.
executives.background: Ernest W. Marshall, Jr. is Executive Vice President and Chief Human Resources Officer. He joined Eaton in 2018. Prior to Eaton, he served in various HR leadership roles at GE Aviation.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Human Resources Officer

board_of_directors.name: Craig Arnold
board_of_directors.background: Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of Eaton since 2016. Joined Eaton in 2000.

board_of_directors.name: Silvio Napoli
board_of_directors.background: Executive Chairman of the Board of Directors of Schindler Holding Ltd. since 2017. He has held various leadership roles at Schindler since 1994.

board_of_directors.name: Deborah McCoy
board_of_directors.background: Retired Senior Vice President, Flight Operations, Continental Airlines, Inc. She served in this role from 1999 until 2005.

board_of_directors.name: Gregory Page
board_of_directors.background: Retired Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of Cargill, Incorporated. He served as Executive Chairman from 2013 to 2015 and CEO from 2007 to 2013.

board_of_directors.name: Dorothy Thompson
board_of_directors.background: Retired Chief Executive Officer of Drax Group plc. She served as CEO from 2005 to 2017.

board_of_directors.name: Lori Ryerkerk
board_of_directors.background: Chairman, Chief Executive Officer and President of Celanese Corporation since 2019. Previously Executive Vice President of Global Manufacturing, Shell Downstream Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Robert Pagano, Jr.
board_of_directors.background: President, Chief Executive Officer and Chairperson of the Board of Watts Water Technologies, Inc. since 2014.

sources.source_description: Eaton Corporation plc 2023 Annual Report on Form 10-K
